featured.name: Order Book Engine
featured.invariant: price-time priority on every match, no order executes at worse price than its limit

featured.name: Distributed Systems Health Monitor
featured.invariant: circuit breaker never allows calls when OPEN, every message delivered or explicitly rejected

featured.name: Raft Consensus KV Store
featured.invariant: at most one leader per term, committed entries present in every future leader's log

featured.name: Pre-Trade Analytics Dashboard
featured.invariant: put-call parity holds for every input combination, not just textbook examples

featured.name: Delivery Order Router
featured.invariant: every order assigned exactly once, no dasher over capacity

featured.name: Distributed Generation Portfolio Monitor
featured.invariant: segmented thresholds detect faults that uniform thresholds are completely blind to

more.name: Legal Document Classifier
more.desc: Classifies legal documents into five categories with a validation layer that checks confidence, class ambiguity, perturbation stability, and input quality. 88% of predictions pass all 5 invariant checks; 9% are flagged for review.

more.name: Go Ride Request Simulator
more.desc: State machine simulator of concurrent ride requests. Goroutine and channel implementations strictly order states when there are multiple concurrent accesses.

more.name: Stat Arb Backtester
more.desc: Z-score engine for pairs trading. 19 test cases verify no lookahead bias, correct signals, and bounded position sizes.

more.name: Security Risk Reporter
more.desc: Scoring engine for an 800-event data processing pipeline. Six invariants: counts preserved, scores bounded [0,1], all silent drops prevented.

more.name: Integration Onboarding Monitor
more.desc: API that acts as a schema gate. 100% of malformed payloads are rejected before they reach the database.

more.name: Centerbridge Webhook Relay
more.desc: Append-only audit log using SHA-256 checksums. Asynchronous delivery of webhook payloads with retry functionality and k6 spike testing.

more.name: Recon-Toolkit
more.desc: CSV reconciliation CLI for fintech ops teams. Primary key matching, rule-based exception labeling, manager-friendly Markdown reports, and full audit trails.

more.name: Redis from Scratch
more.desc: TCP server implementing the Redis wire protocol (RESP) in Rust. Nine stages: RESP parser, core commands, TTL expiry, concurrent clients (tokio), RDB persistence, replication, and Streams. Each stage has a named invariant and passes cargo test before moving on.

more.name: Career Ops MCP
more.desc: MCP server exposing a personal job-search workflow as queryable tools. Three Phase-1 tools: list open applications (flags overdue follow-ups), get full record for one company, list pending outreach emails. Rejected and archived rows are never surfaced — this is the named invariant.
